claimText: As of March 2026, Google Gemini, NotebookLM, and Anthropic Claude are not approved for use with sensitive data at CUIMC; they may only be used with non-sensitive, non-confidential data.

citation.citationTitle: AI and Generative Technology Use at CUIMC
